title: Cozy Earthy Lightly Spiced Saudi Fish Stir-fry
description: A light and earthy vegan-friendly dish featuring fish seasoning in a quick stir-fry that's perfect for any meal.

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp olive oil or vegan alternative

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Season the tilapia fillets with salt, pepper, ground cumin, and smoked paprika. Set aside.
In the same skillet, add olive oil or vegan alternative. Once heated, add onions and garlic, sautéing for 2 minutes until translucent.
Add bell peppers and continue to stir-fry for another minute, until they slightly soften.
Gently place the seasoned tilapia fillets into the skillet. Cook for about 3-4 minutes on each side or until fully cooked through.
Remove from heat and serve hot with steamed vegetables if desired.
